title: 4 Pieces Mini Silicone Spatula Set, Small Rubber Spatula for Makeup, Thin Jar Scraper for Kitchen(4, BLACK)
description:
About this item
3 SIZE SILICONE SET INCLUDES:1 set including 4 pieces:2*Small Spatula 6.06*0.31" (15.4*0.8cm) , 1*Medium Spatula 9.21*0.47" (23.4*1.2cm), and 1*Large Spatula 11.96*0.59" (30.4*1.5cm). Different sizes to meet your different needs.
MADE OF FOOD GRADE SILICONE MATERIAL:These mini spatulas are made of safe food frade silicone,durable and flexible.Designed with small pointed heads and spoon heads, its head features proper flexibility so that spatula can easily reach the bend and corner of the container, so it is suitable for containers of different shapes.
MULTI-FUNCTION SPATULA: This cosmetic silicone spatula is widely applied in many aspects, practical tools for spreading various jams evenly, including peanut butter, ketchup, mushroom sauce and honey; What's more it is suitable for cosmetic use, such as hand soap, body lotion, shampoo, conditioner, lip gloss, nail polish, etc., and you can apply it for other purpose.
EASY TO CLEAN:Silicone Spatulas can be run in the dishwasher or can be quickly and effortlessly cleaned by hand. The one-piece seamless silicone design prevents buildup of food and makeup and very easy to clean. Won't be polluted or eroded, make your cooking always safe and healthy.
HUMANIZED DESIGN: Silicone makeup spatula features narrow head and long handle, easy to hold and comfortable to grip, double-sided curved design allows it to reach deeply into the bottle without wasting .
reviews_5s:
I get more out of my bottles. Saving me money on will my products. I love the spoon on the ends.Great lengths, great value, works well.
Cheap and great way to save a couple dollars to get the last of the productI use these for scooping moisturizer out of jars and into air pumps. You waste too much if you use your finger and I don’t want to contaminate any moisturizer.Awesome for packing joints. Obviously, the smallest one is the only one that works for that since the cones are so smallThese are great for make up and lotion bottles to get every last drop. The tips of them are a little flimsy but they work.It has saved me so much money to be able to get every last drop out of a jar or container. I have lotions that I had usually in the past that was gone wasted because I couldn't get to the bottom of the container, think shampoo bottle type container. I wish I would have gotten these a lot sooner.okMultiple sizes for various usesI'm sure you can also use these for cake decorations--I use to apply small amounts of adhesives, and I can clean and reuse several times.It's hard to mess up a silicone spatula. They work to scrape out product from narrow jars. Huzzah!
reviews_1s: I bought these thinking to use them on makeup containers but they are too large by far to even try to stick them into the narrow tiny opening on the bottles of makeup or any other such tiny mouthed bottleneck. I really don't have any need for them otherwise I would be thrilled but just too big to be useful in the ways advertised for super small containers. It'll probably be easier to just break open the items and get the stuff out that way. Bad buy.Not sturdy at all. They are way too clean but they are too flimsy and they don’t really work too scrape inside a makeup bottle. Keep looking if that’s the reason you’re considering buying these.This is land fillNothing uselessThis are cute and all! But very flimsy and one of the spoon the silicon is cut must of got from cleaning the edges of can not good at all. Don't recommend I will look for something much better.
